LanguageData.BFH.BodyFortification.label: body fortification
LanguageData.BFH.BodyFortification.desc: This pawn's body has been structurally reinforced, reducing all incoming damage. - Light fortification (severity 0.00–0.33): damage ÷ 2 - Moderate fortification (severity 0.34–0.66): damage ÷ 5 - Extreme fortification (severity 0.67–1.00): damage ÷ 10
